name: Chicken and Mushroom Stew (Thursday)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast R-T-C, cut into 1-inch chunks
1 cup roasted potatoes and capers, reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Cook the chicken until it loses its raw appearance.
3. Add the mushrooms and cook until tender.
4. Stir in the chicken broth and reserved potatoes.
5. Add the crushed tomatoes and simmer for about 5 minutes, or until the chicken pieces are firm and opaque.
6. Mix the flour with the remaining oil and whisk into the stew.
7. Simmer for a few more minutes until the liquid thickens slightly.
8. Serve with fresh green beans and chunky bread.
Suzy's note: Freeze and label the rest of the can of crushed tomatoes and save for another use.
